nodes.label: app.html (Website Entry)
nodes.rationale: Website (How to Play / About) entry point; loads analytics script and src/app/main.tsx

nodes.label: App Metrics Analytics Script
nodes.rationale: Deferred analytics tracking script with website-id, only on the website entry not game entries

nodes.label: controller.html (Phone Controller Entry)
nodes.rationale: Phone controller entry point; includes inline loading spinner, AirConsole API script, src/controller/main.tsx. Viewport locks scale for mobile.

nodes.label: screen.html (TV Screen Entry)
nodes.rationale: TV/main screen entry point; includes inline loading spinner, AirConsole API script, src/screen/main.tsx

nodes.label: Inline Loading Spinner
nodes.rationale: Loading spinner visible immediately on page load, auto-replaced when React mounts; added for AirConsole compliance

nodes.label: AirConsole API v1.10.0
nodes.rationale: AirConsole platform JS API loaded by both screen and controller entries

nodes.label: True Friends Quiz
nodes.rationale: Multiplayer party quiz game on AirConsole where players test how well they know each other; game master configures, host votes/picks/answers, others guess

nodes.label: Game Master
nodes.rationale: First player to join; configures settings (language, rounds per player, answer time) and starts the game from master controller

nodes.label: Host (Hot Seat)
nodes.rationale: Each round one player becomes host; votes on a category group, picks a question, answers it privately

nodes.label: Category Voting
nodes.rationale: Host votes on a category group (Fun, Deep, Dilemma, Spicy) before picking a question

nodes.label: Speed Bonus
nodes.rationale: First correct guesser earns +20 bonus points

nodes.label: Streak Tracking
nodes.rationale: Consecutive correct guesses tracked with streak indicators

nodes.label: Free & Pro Categories
nodes.rationale: 9 free categories + 8 Pro (Hero) categories for AirConsole Hero subscribers; 17 categories total, 420+ questions per language

nodes.label: 7-Language i18n
nodes.rationale: English, Greek, Spanish, French, German, Turkish, Arabic; language packs in src/shared/i18n/locales/

nodes.label: Split Game/Website Deployment
nodes.rationale: Game zip (pnpm zip) for AirConsole packages only game files; website served via Dockerfile + nginx.conf on Coolify

nodes.label: v1.2.0 Release
nodes.rationale: Expanded to 200+ questions/7 categories, dynamic per-language loading, category/music toggles, website landing pages, Docker/nginx deployment separation

nodes.label: Dynamic Language Loader
nodes.rationale: Only the selected language is loaded at runtime via dedicated language loader, reducing payload

nodes.label: Background Music
nodes.rationale: 3 compressed OGG tracks with shuffle, auto-advance, pause/resume; toggle from settings

nodes.label: v2.1.2 Release
nodes.rationale: AirConsole compliance & content review for PEGI 12: removed explicit categories, 44px tap targets, loading spinners, controller language independence

nodes.label: PEGI 12 / AirConsole Compliance
nodes.rationale: Removed After Dark, Drunk Confessions, Body Count categories (420 questions across 7 langs); softened Dark Secrets answers for age-appropriateness

nodes.label: Controller Language Independence
nodes.rationale: Controller UI uses the phone's own language instead of being overridden by screen language, per AirConsole requirements

nodes.label: 44px Tap Targets
nodes.rationale: Increased tap target sizes to 44px minimum on controller buttons to meet AirConsole technical requirements

nodes.label: React 19
nodes.rationale: Direct dependency react ^19.2.4 with react-dom

nodes.label: canvas-confetti
nodes.rationale: Direct dependency ^1.9.4 for celebration/confetti effects

nodes.label: Vite 7
nodes.rationale: Dev dependency ^7.3.1 build tool with @vitejs/plugin-react

nodes.label: TypeScript
nodes.rationale: Dev dependency ^5.9.3

hyperedges.label: Round Gameplay Flow (Master, Host, Voting, Speed Bonus)
